name: Portable Shop Cabin
description:
Portable Shop Cabin — Ready-to-Sell Structures for Shops and Kiosks

You need a shopfront fast. Renting permanent space is expensive and construction takes months. A portable shop cabin is a factory-built retail unit — display window, rolling shutter, counter shelf — delivered to your site in 7 days and ready to trade from immediately. If you run a kiosk, retail outlet, or temporary store, this is the cabin you are looking for.

What You Get in a Portable Shop Cabin

SAMAN portable shop cabins come fitted for retail use from delivery day. Every unit includes a sliding display window at counter height — customers can see your products without stepping inside. The front panel takes a rolling shutter that locks with a ground bolt, so you close up in seconds and open the same way. Inside, a fixed counter shelf runs the full length of the front wall and gives you a clean surface to serve from.

The MS frame and insulated sandwich panel walls hold up outdoors in all weather. Electrical points are fitted as standard — connect your lighting, fan, or payment device from day one. You choose the exterior colour to match your brand or shop signage.

This is a purpose-built shop unit. It is not a portable cabin with a window added on — the counter, shutter, and display setup are designed into the structure.

SAMAN portable shop cabin — sliding display window at counter height, fold-up canopy panel, and fixed serving counter. Available in any colour. Delivered in 7 working days.

Sizes for Kiosks, Retail Outlets, and Temporary Stores

The right size depends on what you sell and how many people work inside.

An 8×10 ft unit (80 sq ft) suits a single-operator kiosk — snacks, mobile accessories, a pharmacy window, or a ticketing counter. One person works comfortably with full counter space.

Compact 8×10 ft portable shop cabin — single-operator kiosk with rolling shutter, display counter, and menu board. Set up in a park, plaza, or commercial compound.

A 10×12 ft unit (120 sq ft) is the most popular size for a retail outlet. Two people can work inside, with shelving along the back wall and the display counter at the front.

A 12×20 ft unit (240 sq ft) suits a larger shop — grocery, garments, or a service outlet with a small waiting area. This size can also take a partition wall to separate a back-room storage area from the retail floor.

Not sure which size works for your business? Call us and we will tell you in 5 minutes.

When a Portable Shop Cabin Is the Right Choice

This cabin is right for you in 3 situations.

You are opening a new retail outlet and cannot wait for permanent construction. The cabin arrives complete — no contractor, no site work, no permit queue for a built structure.

You are running a shop during a building renovation. Your permanent shopfront is closed for 3 to 6 months and you need a professional-looking temporary space that keeps customers coming.

You want a permanent kiosk or roadside outlet. These cabins are built for long-term outdoor use. They are relocatable — but they are not flimsy. Most stay in one place for 5 years or more.

A portable shop cabin in permanent use at a commercial plaza — display case counter, fold-up canopy, branded signage panel, and wooden serving counter. SAMAN portable shop cabins are built for outdoor use year-round.

If you need a general-purpose relocatable cabin for offices, storage, or site accommodation, see our full range on the portable cabin page. If you use the term porta cabin and are buying for a construction-site retail setup, see our porta cabin for shop page instead.

Portable Shop Cabin Price and Delivery

Portable shop cabins start at Rs 2,25,000 for an 8×10 ft kiosk unit with display window and rolling shutter. A 10×12 ft retail outlet unit starts at Rs 2,65,000. Larger sizes and custom fit-outs are quoted on request — most quotes go out within 2 hours.

Custom portable shop cabin — charcoal grey exterior, Edison pendant lighting, wooden serving counter. Every SAMAN cabin is colour-customised to your brand. Quote delivered in 2 hours.

We deliver to South India and Greater Noida in 7 working days from order confirmation. Installation takes 3 to 4 hours on site. You need a flat surface and one power connection point — we handle the shutter fitting, counter installation, and electrical connection.

To check delivery to your location and place an order, see our buy a portable cabin page.

Questions Shop Owners Ask

Can I add a display window and rolling shutter to my portable shop cabin?

Both are standard fitments on every SAMAN portable shop cabin — not optional extras. The display window sits at counter height and is 3 ft wide as standard. The rolling shutter covers the full front opening and locks with a ground bolt. You specify the shutter width when you place the order.

Can the cabin be used permanently outdoors as a fixed shopfront?

Yes. The MS frame is hot-dip galvanised, the roof is pitched to drain water away from the structure, and the insulated panel walls handle heat, rain, and humidity year-round. Most SAMAN portable shop cabins are in continuous outdoor use for 5 to 10 years without structural issues.

Portable shop cabin in long-term outdoor use — extended canopy roof, sliding glass door, front serving counter, and interior shelving. Set up once. Trade for years.

Can two portable shop cabins be joined side by side to create a larger shop?

Yes — 2 units can be connected with a joining panel between them. Floor levels are matched at the factory so the join is flush and even. Many buyers start with one 10×12 ft unit and add a second after 6 to 12 months as the business grows. If you need an expandable cabin system from day one, see our modular portable cabin instead.

Tell us your shop size, location, and when you need the cabin. We will send you a price and photos of similar retail setups within 2 hours. Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937
short_description:
🏪 10×10×8.6 ft — display window, rolling shutter · Kiosk · Retail Outlet · Temporary Store · Trading-ready in 7 days

Portable shop cabin — 10×10×8.6 ft retail-fitment unit with sliding display window at counter height, rolling shutter with ground bolt, and fixed counter shelf. MS frame, insulated panel walls, electrical points pre-fitted. No site construction needed — delivered complete and ready to trade from day one.

Size
10×10×8.6 ft
Capacity
1–2 operators
Frame / Panel
MS · insulated panels
Fitments
Window · shutter · shelf
Price
From Rs 2,25,000
Delivery
7 working days
